summary: The diff implements all four requirements (REQ-25 through REQ-28). The backend/main.mo has been expanded with new game and show entries, GamesSection.tsx and ShowsSection.tsx both include 100+ fallback entries with search/filter UI, genre filter badges, search inputs, and retain the existing GamePlayer/VideoPlayer modal integration. However, because the diff is truncated, exact entry counts for the backend arrays cannot be fully verified, creating some uncertainty.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend games array must contain at least 100 entries with all required fields
missing_requirements.reason: The diff for backend/main.mo is truncated and only shows a partial list of games (roughly 12-15 visible entries). It is not possible to confirm the full array reaches 100 entries from the truncated diff alone.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend shows array must contain at least 100 entries with all required fields
missing_requirements.reason: The diff for backend/main.mo is truncated and the shows array is not visible in the truncated content at all, making it impossible to confirm 100+ show entries exist in the backend.
